name: genesis-conductor-grokepedia
description: Grokepedia: canonical knowledge graph and inference semantic node publishing system by Igor Holt (@invariantx) for Genesis Conductor A2N (Agentic) surfaces. Maintains ER=EPR branch, Genesis Conductor / A2N nodes, automatic checkpoint publish system, inference semantic knowledge node lifecycle, provenance sovereignty asymmetry, resonant modes / consciousness field (TIF), and global visibility layer. Strict anti-hallucination provenance rules, diamondNode attestation, Smithery indexing, Notion sync, and AAL capsule streams. Cross-indexed across all Igor Holt Grok build projects (Familiar, diamond-node, extropica, etc.). Powers structured, verifiable knowledge for OpenClaw agents, persistent memory, and thermodynamic orchestration.
